overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a turquoise jacket and cap exploring a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses elevated walkways, crosses multi-lane streets with sparse traffic, and pauses on an open concrete overlook with panoramic views of the illuminated skyline.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange textured elevated walkway beside a metal guard rail

entered.detail: distinctive orange textured pedestrian walkway surface
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
elevated highway overpass with yellow accent lighting
large illuminated digital screen displaying advertisements
tall street lamp with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with distinctive orange textured paving. To the left, an elevated highway structure with yellow lights stretches into the distance, while a large digital billboard stands on the right.

events.description: character stops at street corner near traffic light pole to wait
futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street ahead

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner near a traffic light pole, observing passing traffic before crossing

marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner next to a traffic light pole, waiting as futuristic vehicles pass by. The crosswalk and distant neon-lit city skyline become visible ahead.

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction across the crosswalk

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the multi-lane street using the crosswalk, moving toward the opposite sidewalk. Neon-lit skyscrapers dominate the background while another pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by concrete support pillars and glowing digital billboards overhead. A yellow taxi passes on the street below while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete elevated platform overlooking the city

events.description: crossing street and entering open concrete overlook area with panoramic views
character turns and walks along the concrete platform edge

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking onto an open concrete overlook platform with panoramic city views

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige jacket walking alongside ego toward the overlook

entered.detail: open concrete platform with smooth surface overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and steps onto an open concrete overlook platform, leaving the covered walkway behind. The expansive city skyline with neon-lit skyscrapers fills the background as the character walks along the platform edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated concrete observation deck with 360-degree city views

events.description: character stops briefly to look around at the city view
character turns and continues walking along the platform perimeter

agents.ego_description: walking around the open concrete platform, observing the neon-lit city skyline from different angles

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open concrete overlook, walking around the perimeter and taking in the panoramic views of the illuminated futuristic city. The camera circles around the character, showing the vast neon-lit skyline from multiple angles.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level sidewalk returning toward the highway underpass

events.description: descending from elevated platform back to street level sidewalk
waiting near traffic light at street corner before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking back down to street level and along the sidewalk toward the intersection with the elevated highway

entered.detail: street level pedestrian sidewalk with textured surface
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
curved ramp of the elevated highway structure with yellow lighting

segments.scene_description: The character returns to street level, walking along the sidewalk toward an intersection. The elevated highway ramp with distinctive yellow lighting appears on the right, while a child pedestrian stands near the corner. The character waits briefly near a traffic light before continuing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from enclosed pedestrian walkways to an expansive city overlook before returning to the street level. It begins with the character walking along an elevated walkway with orange paving beside a glowing highway, moving forward until they pause at a street corner as futuristic vehicles pass. As the character crosses the multi-lane street toward a backdrop of towering skyscrapers, the scene shifts into a covered walkway beneath concrete pillars and overhead digital billboards. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the cover onto an open concrete overlook, circling them to reveal a panoramic view of the illuminated skyline from multiple angles. Finally, the perspective descends back to the sidewalk, passing a yellow-lit highway ramp and a waiting pedestrian before the character continues toward a distant intersection.
